description_long: This is a classic single-bit axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a heavy, wedge-shaped metal head. The handle is pale beige with a subtle grain, showing signs of wear and a gentle curve for ergonomic grip. The axe head is painted a deep red, with the cutting edge exposed in metallic gray, and the poll is squared off for striking. The transition between the handle and the head is tight, with the head securely mounted onto the handle. There is a visible marking or label on the side of the axe head, possibly a logo or brand insignia. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian tool suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks in an urban or suburban environment.
description: A classic axe with a curved wooden handle and a red-painted, wedge-shaped metal head, featuring a visible marking on the blade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the red-painted axe head with a visible marking.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, showing its narrow, rounded cross-section and the alignment with the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the handle's curve and the solid, wedge-shaped profile of the axe head.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the width of the axe head and the way it is mounted onto the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an oval cross-section, smooth surface, and no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single-bit, wedge-shaped blade with a straight cutting edge, squared poll, and red paint covering most of the head except the edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: white marking or logo on the side of the axe head
